Five distinct asset types (functional_reading, confidence framing, clarification_paths, monitoring signals, why_beyond_itself) are absent from all current governed assets. Gap confirmed by source file reads. Sprint is not a no-op.

A new pack (e.g. knowledge_bus/functional_interpretation_v1/) is a clean governed home consistent with prompt Rule 4 (authority separation). pathway_explainers_v1 header (line 1-4) explicitly excludes confidence/monitoring content. No architectural adjudication needed.

New pack at knowledge_bus/functional_interpretation_v1/ has clean separation from: pathway explainers (pathway biology prose), hypotheses (root-cause evidence rules), IDL (display labels), retail_explainer (UI education). No blur if placed correctly.

Functional interpretation and confidence assets describe interpretive moves (what the pattern means functionally, what limits certainty). These do not require new interpretation entity resolution before authoring.
